Accommodation guide · 2025

Girls PG near DIEMS Engineering College, Osmanpura — what parents need to know

0.9 km from DIEMS From ₹2,999/month

Why DIEMS engineering girls need a different kind of PG

Deogiri Institute of Engineering and Management Studies (DIEMS) in Osmanpura is one of Chhatrapati Sambhajinagar's most sought-after engineering colleges, with over 1,300 students and a strong placement record. For female engineering students, finding safe, reliable accommodation close to campus is one of the first challenges after admission.

Engineering students have specific needs that standard PGs often overlook — 24x7 power backup for late-night project work, stable high-speed Wi-Fi for accessing lab resources and submitting assignments, and a quiet environment during exam season. A power cut at midnight before a lab submission deadline is not an inconvenience — it's a crisis.

Jyoti Girls PG — 0.9 km from DIEMS campus

Jyoti Girls PG in Jyoti Nagar, Osmanpura is a 10–12 minute walk from DIEMS. Female engineering students from across Maharashtra — Latur, Nanded, Beed, Hingoli — choose Jyoti Girls PG because it combines the safety parents require with the infrastructure engineering students depend on.

  • 24x7 power backup — no interruptions during project submissions or late study sessions
  • High-speed Wi-Fi — reliable connectivity for online resources, lab reports, and academic portals
  • No bunk beds — proper single beds with personal wardrobe and study desk in every room
  • 24x7 female warden — secure, supervised environment parents trust
  • Walking distance — no daily auto or rickshaw expense, saving ₹1,500–2,000 per month

Pricing — transparent, no hidden charges

Two plans are available. Twin sharing (2 beds, 1 room) at ₹5,000 per month — preferred by students who want more personal space and a quieter study environment. Standard sharing (3–4 beds per room) at ₹2,999 per month — the most popular choice for its value. Both plans include Wi-Fi, power backup, housekeeping, and RO water. Meals are not included — affordable tiffin options are available nearby.

What engineering parents ask before booking

Parents from outside Sambhajinagar often ask the same questions before confirming a PG for their daughter. Here are the most common ones answered:

  • Is there a study desk in every room? Yes — every room has a dedicated study table and chair.
  • What happens during load shedding? 24x7 power backup ensures lights, fans, and Wi-Fi remain uninterrupted.
  • Can we visit before confirming? Yes — we encourage a visit before booking. WhatsApp us to schedule.
  • Is the locality safe at night? Jyoti Nagar is a well-lit, residential area. CCTV covers all common areas and the entrance.

How to reach Jyoti Girls PG from DIEMS

From DIEMS main gate, walk south on Jyoti Nagar road for approximately 10–12 minutes. Jyoti Girls PG is located near Icon English High School and Dashmesh Mandir — both well-known local landmarks. Auto rickshaw from DIEMS to the PG costs approximately ₹30–40.

To check current availability or schedule a visit, WhatsApp us directly — we typically respond within a few hours.
